ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the employee is based in */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "current_position" TEXT /* Current position or role of the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., Active, On Leave, Terminated) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "head_office" TEXT /* Location of the head office for the region */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being assessed */,
  "sociability" INTEGER /* Sociability score of the employee */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the employee */,
  "career_level" INTEGER /* Career level of the employee */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Overall score of the assessment */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group to which the employee is categorized (e.g., Good, Average, Needs Improvement) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the assessment */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* Date of the next retest, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_career_level FOREIGN KEY ("career_level") REFERENCES career_levels ("career_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES assessment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_levels" (
  "career_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career level */,
  "career_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the career level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the career level */,
  "min_score" INTEGER /* Minimum score required to be at this career level */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score required to be at this career level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the assessment (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the feedback */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the feedback is related to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback and recommendations */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when a follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR Manager, Department Head, Employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
